item.name: js_tracking
item.label: JS tracking
item.help: [JS tracking]||Send pageviews and engagement via beacon.js||When no, beacon.js loads but does not call the API

item.name: php_tracking
item.label: PHP tracking
item.help: [PHP tracking]||Record pageviews on server when this panel is rendered (full page or position load)||Default on when the beacon panel is present
